urls.title: CycloCast Mega Customer Research Survey
urls.description: At CycloCast India Pvt Ltd, we are on a mission to build India’s most accurate and powerful weather intelligence platform — combining a next-generation Weather Dashboard and an AI assistant called CycloCast GPT. This survey is designed to understand: What users dislike in current weather apps What features you truly need in a weather dashboard How AI can improve weather predictions and alerts And how we can build a platform that is simple, fast, and highly accurate Your feedback will directly help us: ✅ Improve real-time weather tracking ✅ Build better cyclone & disaster alerts 🌀 ✅ Design a clean, user-friendly dashboard ✅ Develop a powerful AI weather assistant ⏱️ Takes only 3–5 minutes 🔒 Your responses will be kept confidential and used only for research purposes 🚀 Be part of building India’s most advanced weather platform. Your opinion matters!

text:
🚨 Building India’s Next-Gen Weather Platform!
Tired of inaccurate forecasts & complex apps? 🌧️

We’re creating a powerful Weather Dashboard + AI assistant 

👉 Take this 3-min survey & shape the future: 
https://t.co/EZtt6Q0E5I

#Weather #AI #StartupIndia #CycloCast
